nasb.text: So the common man will be humbled and the man of importance abased, The eyes of the proud also will be abased.

esv.text: Man is humbled, and each one is brought low, and the eyes of the haughty are brought low.

cnv.text: 卑賤人俯首，尊貴人降卑， 眼目高傲的也降卑。

ccb.text: 世人遭贬，降为卑下， 狂妄者眼目低垂。

csbs.text: 人必被降卑，个个卑贱， 眼目高傲的也都卑贱。
